1251
1252
       Figure 11: SMNLI DGP. Graphical model showing the data generating process for modifying
       examples from the MNLI dataset to introduce a new spurious keyword feature S.
1253
1254
1255
1256                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Data augmentation prompt
1257
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            You are a language model designed to modify a piece of text to include an additional feature in a simple, natural way while keeping
1258                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        your output as similar as possible to the original text.
1259
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Features
1260
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • pineapple: Include the word ‘pineapple’.
1261
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Bayesian: Include the word ‘Bayesian’.
1262
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Instructions
1263
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Ensure the output is grammatically correct.
1264
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Keep the output as similar as possible to the original text.
1265
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Make the minimal number of modifications and add the fewest new tokens possible to satisfy the chosen feature.
1266
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Do not change the sentiment of the original text.
1267
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Do not significantly alter the length of the output.
1268
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Incorporate the feature naturally within the original text so that it blends seamlessly with the text’s context.
1269
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Do not only append additional clauses at the end of the text to include the feature.
1270
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Inclusions should be case sensitive, e.g., include ‘Bayesian’ BUT NOT ‘bayesian’.
1271
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Output
1272
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Only return the modified text, with no additional explanations or reasoning.
1273
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Should strictly follow the feature description and the set of instructions.
1274
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Only include the one feature given; the other features SHOULD NOT be included even accidentally.
1275
1276
1277
1278   A.8                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     S PURIOUS NLI DATASET (SMNLI)
1279
1280   We generate a tertiary NLI dataset, SMNLI, with a known spurious feature. We do this considering
1281   the MNLI dataset Williams et al. (2018). This is a NLI dataset with three labels: entailment (0),
1282   neutral (1) and contradiction (2), where data is sampled from 5 underlying categories or genres
1283   (telephone, government, travel, fiction or slate). We aim to induce spurious correlations between the
1284   underlying genres and labels.
1285   Data-generating process (DGP). We consider a graphical model to describe the DGP of examples
1286   within the SMNLI dataset. We use the following variables within our DGP:
1287
1288                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • C - NLI relationship between a premise and hypothesis pair, the causal feature within this
1289                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              task, sampled from the original dataset.
1290
1291                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • S - spurious feature, here this is the genre of the premise and hypothesis. This is a categor-
1292                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              ical variable.
1293
1294                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • X - example from the MNLI dataset.
1295
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • Y - final label for element X.


                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  24
       Under review as a conference paper at ICLR 2025

1319
       More specifically, given the orignal dataset D that we are sub-sampling from, the functions that we
       use within the DGP for the SMNLI dataset are given by:
1320
1321       S ∼ Cat(S),            Y = S. (50)
1328
1329   Here, Cat(S) is a uniform categorical distribution over spurious feature values (here the underlying
1330   genre of the premise-hypothesis pairs). Furthermore, we define Ĉ(S) to be the entailment label that a
1331   particular value of S is spuriously correlated with by design. Moreover, pD (·|C, S) is the conditional
1332   distribution over the dataset examples (premise-hypothesis pairs) that have NLI relationship C and
1333   genre S.
1334   We restrict the genres within the model to S ∈ {slate, government, fiction, travel}, a subset of the
1335   genres of the training set. When creating a distribution shifted test set, we restrict the genres to
1336   S ∈ {facetoface, nineeleven, verbatim}. The specific spurious correlations between genres and
1337   labels Y are chosen to be:
1338
1339
             1. Ĉ(slate) = 0;
1340         2. Ĉ(government) = 2;
1341
             3. Ĉ(fiction) = 1;
1342
1343         4. Ĉ(travel) = 0;
1344         5. Ĉ(facetoface) = 2;
1345
1346         6. Ĉ(nineeleven) = 0;
1347         7. Ĉ(verbatim) = 1.
1348
1349   In this way we generate spurious correlations within the dataset through sub-sampling to induce spu-
       rious correlations between S and Y . In this case, for a dataset example X, the spurious correlation

1370   SCM for SMNLI. The DGP again induces a SCM that induces spurious correlations between spu-
1371
       rious features S and the label Y . The SCM has the same structure as in the SS dataset, and is given
       in Figure 14 where once again, U again is some hidden confounding variable.
1372
1373
1374
       A.9                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  S PURIOUS HANS DATASET (SHANS)
1375   We generate a binary NLI dataset, SHANS, with a known spurious feature. We do this considering
1376   the HANS dataset McCoy (2019). This is an NLI data set with two labels: entailment (0) and
1377   contradiction (1). This is an adversarial dataset designed to assess different NLI models’ reliance on
1378   spurious heuristics rather than on the underlying relationship between the premise and the hypothesis
1379   when making predictions. Specifically, the author’s consider three major categories of heuristics:
1380   lexical overlap heuristic (assuming that a premise entails from words within the hypothesis) , sub-
1381   sequence heuristic( assuming that the premise entails all any of its contiguous sub-sequences of
1382   words) and constituent heuristic (assuming that a premise entails a hypothesis that is any constituent
1383
       within it’s syntactic parse tree).
1384   Data-generating process (DGP). We consider a graphical model to describe the DGP of examples
1385   within the SHANS dataset. We use the following variables within our DGP:
1386
1387
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • C - NLI relationship between a premise and hypothesis pair, the causal feature within this
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              task, sampled from the original dataset.
1388
1389                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Slex. - spurious feature, here the presence of a hypothesis entirely made from words from
1390
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              the premise. This is a binary categorical variable (present/ not present).
1391                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Ssub. - spurious feature, here the presence of a hypothesis that is a contiguous subsequence
1392                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          of the premise. This is a binary category feature (present/ not present).
1393                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Sconst. - spurious feature, here the presence of hypothesis that is a constituent/subtree of the
1394                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          premise. Here we have a binary variable (present/ not present).
1395                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • X - example from the HANS dataset.
1396                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Y - final label for element X.
1397
1398   The graphical model described by the DGP for producing the S-HANS dataset is given in Figure 13.
1399   Once again, this graphical model can be represented functionally as
1400                                          S = fS (US );                                        (52)
1401                                         C = fC (S, UC );                                      (53)
1402                                         X = fX (C, E, UX );                                   (54)
1403
                                             Y = fY (C, UY ),                                      (55)

1415   Figure 14: SHANS SCM. SCM showing the spurious correlations present between the binary pre-

       dataset, induced through the described sub-sampling process of the S-HANS dataset.
1418
1419   where here we define S to be a categorical feature over the set of the presence of each of
1420   the three heuristics introduced above which we denote, through overloaded notation, by S =
1421   {Slex. , Ssub. , Sconst. }. More specifically, given the original dataset D that we are sub-sampling from,
1422   the functions that we use within the DGP for the S-HANS dataset are given by:

            S ∼ Cat(S),              (56)

           UC ∼ Ber(ρspurious );              (60)
1431   Here, cat(S) is a uniform categorical distribution over S which effectively selects the precence of
1432
       exactly one of the three spurious feature heuristics. We define Ĉ(S) to be the entailment label that a
1433   particular value of S is spuriously correlated with by design. Moreover, pD (·|C, S) is the conditional
1434   distribution over the dataset examples (premise-hypothesis pairs) that have NLI relationship C and
1435   the presence of spurious heuristics S.
1436
       We consider the presence of each feature to be separate binary spurious features. The specific
1437
       spurious correlations between heuristics and labels Y are chosen to be:
1438
1439          1. Ĉ(Slex. ) = 0;
1440
1441          2. Ĉ(Ssub. ) = 0;
1442          3. Ĉ(Sconst. ) = 1;
1443
1444   In this way we generate spurious correlations within the dataset through sub-sampling to induce
1445   spurious correlations between the heuristics and Y . In this case, for a dataset example X, the
1446   spurious correlation between the presence of a particular heuristic S = s and Ĉ(s) is given as
1447
                                     P(Y = Ĉ(s)|X, S = s, s ∈ X) = ρspurious . 1449   This follows immediately form the sub-sampling process described above. Once again, this aligns
1450   with the definition in Equation (4) which again justifies the introduced notation.
1451   SCM for SHANS. The DGP again induces a SCM. In particular, considering S as consiting of three
1452   binary spurious features Slex. , Ssub. and Sconst. . The SCM has a similar structure to as in the SS and
1453   S-MNLI datasets, and is given in Figure 14 where once again, U again is some hidden confounding
1454   variable.

1467
1468   Figure 15:          SHANS focus accuracies (↑).                 Focus accuracy (Afocus ) of
1469
       Llama-3.1-8B-Instructafter FIT on the SHANS dataset. Here, C refers to the causal
       feature (logical relationship between premise and hypothesis) and S the spurious feature (heuristic
1470
       used)
1471
1472
1473   Spurious HANS (SHANS) dataset. We generate binary NLI dataset sub-sampled from HANS (Mc-
1474   Coy, 2019), a dataset designed to challenge NLI models by exposing common heuristics they rely on,
1475   such as lexical overlap (whether the hypothesis shares many words with the premise), sub-sequence
1476   (whether the hypothesis is a contiguous sub-sequence of the premise), and constituent (whether the
1477   hypothesis is a grammatical sub-structure of the premise). The presence of these heuristics are spu-
1478   riously correlated with labels through sub-sampling the presence of each of the heuristics from the
1479
       original dataset. The degree of co-occurrence is governed by ρspurious , which varies according to the
       test sets described in Section 3. We ensure that ρspurious is the same for all feature values within each
1480
       dataset split. In particular, we set ρspurious to be 0.5, 0.5, 0.9, 0.25 and 0.9 on Dtrain , Diid , Dhigh , Dlow
1481
       and Dflipped respectively.
1482
1483   Results. Figure 15 shows the focus accuracy results of performing SFT and FIT on the SHANS
1484   dataset for the Llama-3.1-8B-Instructmodel. As expected, the trained features show high
1485
       focus accuracy. However, for non-trained features, we observe lower focus accuracy. This could be
       attributed to the overlapping nature of the heuristics in SHANS, which are often graded versions of
1486
       each other with different levels of specificity. For instance, the sub-sequence heuristic can overlap
1487
       with both lexical overlap and constituent heuristics (e.g., the example with Premise:“Before the actor
1488   slept, the senator ran” and Hypothesis: “The actor slept.” satisfies all three heuristics). This overlap
1489   likely confuses the model during generalisation, as it struggles to distinguish between heuristics not
1490   seen during training and those that are similar. These results suggest a potential limitation of FIT
1491   when dealing with features that are not sufficiently distinct or have significant overlap.
